Book a Demo

Your packaging
data layer.

Book a Demo → See how it works →

Phantm gives Australian businesses a single, validated packaging data layer — so compliance reporting, supplier accountability and regulatory readiness stop being projects and start being outputs.

The Problem
Fragmented · Critical · Compounding

Packaging data is fragmented — but now business-critical.

APCO annual reporting, ARL disclosure and national packaging reform are here. Yet most teams rebuild the same data from scratch every cycle — across spreadsheets, emails and disconnected systems.

Data

Fragmented data

No one owns a complete view — every report starts from zero.

Regulation

More obligations

APCO, ARL, PREP — filed separately, rebuilt manually, owned by no one.

Suppliers

Critical data locked

Hard to collect, harder to keep current, impossible to validate.

Cycles

Rebuilding reports

Teams rebuild what already exists. The next regulation resets the clock.

How Phantm gets brands DATA ready

Build the data asset first. Reporting becomes an output, not the project.

01

Discover

What data exists?

Map hard + soft data, fixed sources, gaps, owners and repeatability.

02

Capture at source

If no data, go back to the source.

Engage suppliers and domain experts to correct, validate and evidence packaging data.

03

Structure + enrich

Make it reusable.

Create a repeatable schema, link product to packaging, enrich and fill gaps with confidence.

04

Report + improve

Turn data into decisions.

Use the same asset for APCO reporting, ARL/PREP assessment, EPR cost exposure, redesign and change evidence.

The outcome

Packaging reform becomes an advantage, not just a cost.

The companies that do well will be those that build packaging data capability, supplier change control and regulatory expertise — they avoid late redesigns, higher costs and fragmented decision-making.

APCO Annual reporting — due every cycle
ARL Australasian Recycling Label coverage
PREP Recyclability assessment, evidenced
One Reusable data asset for all obligations
Next Steps

See Phantm in action.

Book a short demo built around your products, your suppliers and your compliance obligations.
